title: Stealth Optimized
description: Stealth Optimized" is a Minecraft FPS-boosting modpack featuring underrated performance mods for smoother gameplay and higher frame rates. Ideal for low-end PCs, it enhances game performance with minimal resource usage.
body: Stealth Optimized Modpack is a high-performance Minecraft modpack designed to significantly boost FPS and enhance gameplay experience. Featuring a carefully curated selection of underrated, powerful mods, this modpack focuses on optimizing game performance for smoother and faster gameplay. It includes FPS-boosting mods like FastChest to speed up chest interactions, Ksyxis for rendering and resource optimization, FastOpenLinksAndFolders for quicker navigation, and No Telemetry to improve privacy and reduce resource usage. With Mod Menu for easy mod management and Phosphor for optimized lighting, Stealth Optimized ensures Minecraft runs efficiently, even on low-end PCs. Perfect for players seeking an enhanced Minecraft experience with minimal lag and maximum FPS.
